title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 375.030 - Continuing education, programs approved for another profession
text:
375.030.  Continuing education, programs approved for another profession. — Any course or program of instruction approved for use to meet professional continuing education in another Missouri profession, as required by law, that relates to the topic of insurance shall meet the continuing education requirements pursuant to section 375.020.
(L. 1996 S.B. 664 § 17)
